expectations.text: Clear categorization: Decided, Undecided, Not-yet-discussed clearly separated
expectations.evidence: Three clear categories: 확정 (2건), 선택지 좁혀진 것 (2건), 논의 시작 전 (3건).

expectations.text: Decision cleanup intervention: Proposes priority order for undecided items
expectations.evidence: Recommends DB first with dependency reasoning: 'API 구조 결정이 DB 특성에 영향을 받습니다' → DB first unblocks API.

expectations.text: State file accuracy: Correctly categorizes items
expectations.evidence: state.md correctly lists OAuth and React as decided, DB and API as undecided with options.

expectations.text: Visualization suggestion: Offers status dashboard or similar
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly suggest a visualization. Misses an opportunity to offer 'want to see this as a dashboard?'

expectations.text: Pre-decision summary: Provides context when suggesting which to tackle first
expectations.evidence: Explains dependency chain before recommending DB: API depends on DB choice, deployment depends on both.
